AMERGE® is indicated for the acute treatment of migraine with or without aura in
adults.
Limitations of Use:
 Use only if a clear diagnosis of migraine has been established. If a patient has no response to
the first migraine attack treated with AMERGE, reconsider the diagnosis of migraine before
